output.context: Re-verification after legacy fallback revert and one-off migration script. PHP no longer has conditional enableDescription/enableButtons -- both are hardcoded false. All 15 blocks on page 168 were migrated from legacy attribute format to InnerBlocks format.

build.details: Build completes successfully with only expected performance warnings (editor.js 339KB, screen.js 377KB). No TypeScript errors.

newTestPage.details: All 5 blocks render InnerBlocks content correctly.

oldTestPage.details: All 15 migrated blocks render correctly. Descriptions appear as paragraphs inside .discourse wrapper. Buttons render as links inside .discourse wrapper. Dark mode blocks retain proper styling. Blocks that originally had no description/buttons render heading-only correctly.

perBlockResults.heading: Featured Student Story
perBlockResults.note: Description migrated to paragraph, 2 buttons migrated to button-row

perBlockResults.note: Description migrated to paragraph, 1 button migrated

perBlockResults.note: No eyebrow (correct), description migrated, 1 button migrated

perBlockResults.note: Dark mode section, description migrated, 2 buttons migrated

perBlockResults.note: Dark mode reversed section, description migrated, 1 button migrated

perBlockResults.note: Video block with file, description migrated, 1 button migrated

perBlockResults.note: CORRECT: Originally had no description/buttons, so no InnerBlocks. Renders heading-only correctly.

perBlockResults.note: CORRECT: Originally had no description/buttons, so no InnerBlocks. Renders heading + media only.

perBlockResults.note: Dark mode video, description-only migrated (no buttons)

perBlockResults.note: Dark mode single image, description-only migrated (no buttons)

perBlockResults.note: headingSize=small renders h3. Description migrated, 1 button migrated.

headingOnlyBlocks.note: Blocks that originally had no description/buttons correctly render with heading only. No empty discourse wrapper.

phpTemplate.details: ThemeHeading has hardcoded enableDescription => false and enableButtons => false (lines 78-79). No conditional logic, no legacy fallback. No references to $description or $buttons variables anywhere in PHP. No $attributes['key'] extraction anti-pattern.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP are perfectly synchronized after the revert.

syncPoints.note: PHP conditional prevents empty wrapper; TSX always renders for editor interaction

syncPoints.tsx: No matches for description|buttons in TSX

migrationVerification.details: All 15 blocks on old page are in InnerBlocks format. No blocks use legacy attribute format.
migrationVerification.note: The 2 empty blocks (Quick Video, Minimal Section) originally had no description/buttons, so they correctly have no InnerBlocks. This is expected.

passedChecks: Build passes with no TypeScript errors

New test page: paragraph, list, quote, and button-row blocks all render correctly

Old test page: 9 blocks with buttons have button-row rendered inside discourse

PHP template: enableDescription and enableButtons hardcoded to false (no conditional)
PHP template: no references to $description or $buttons variables
TSX/PHP sync: ThemeHeading props match exactly
TSX/PHP sync: InnerBlocks wrapper class 'discourse' matches
TSX/PHP sync: no legacy attribute references in either file
Block count verified: 5 on new page, 15 on old page
